channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Cybercriminals allegedly hacked tens of thousands of Fortinet firewalls used by major companies all over the world
item.description: An alleged Russian-speaking group of cybercriminals are reportedly compromising and targeting several major companies that use Fortinet Firewalls and VPNs through previously known passwords.

item.title: Meet Kali365 — the 'Amazon of cybercrime' where hackers use AI to completely circumvent multi-factor authentication
item.description: Kali365 abuses the current OAuth device code flow on Microsoft accounts in a sophisticated attempt to dupe users into signing into their accounts

item.title: Social media’s next evolution: user-controlled algorithms
item.description: Social media feeds are becoming more customizable as platforms like Threads, Instagram, and TikTok introduce tools that let users directly influence the algorithms powering their recommendations.

item.title: World model maker Odyssey nabs $1.45B valuation backed by Amazon and other big names
item.description: World models are the next big thing in AI beyond LLMs and, with this round, Odyssey has cemented itself as one of the startups to watch.

item.title: Mastodon looks to newsletters to help revive the open social web
item.description: Mastodon’s newly launched newsletter feature lets anyone subscribe to creators by email, even without a Mastodon account.

item.title: Murkier than ever: Trump’s reflecting pool is the mirror image of his war in Iran
item.description: The allegedly ending Iran war has a perfect metaphorical counterpart in another recent Trump project: renovating the reflecting pool. What kind of pool-cleaning gear does $14.2 million buy? According to the Department of the Interior, who oversaw recent renovations to the Lincoln Memorial reflecting pool, it’ll get you “high-tech nanobubble ozone technology,” which may or may not be as impressive as it sounds....

item.title: Test du Steam Controller : Valve tient-il la manette universelle à 99 € ?
item.description: Valve lance une nouvelle manette Steam Controller qui se veut idéale aussi bien pour les jeux PC que pour les jeux de salon. La manette universelle parfaite ?

item.title: Sommet du G7 | « Ne cédez pas vos responsabilités aux acteurs de l’IA », déclare le patron d’OpenAI
item.description: Le patron d’OpenAI, Sam Altman, a appelé mercredi les dirigeants des pays du G7 à ne pas « [céder leurs] responsabilités aux acteurs de l’IA comme » son groupe en matière de régulation, lors d’une allocution prononcée en marge du Sommet d’Évian.

item.title: Two-thirds of Americans think AI is advancing too quickly
item.description: According to the latest Pew Research poll, 49 percent of Americans report using chatbots at least occasionally, but 63 percent think the tech is advancing too quickly. Overall, use of AI chatbots has increased dramatically since 2024, when only 33 percent reported using them. Specifically, ChatGPT's usage has doubled since 2023, with 44 percent of […]...

item.title: Gamers beware — experts flag Steam Workshop is being abused to spread malware via Wallpaper Engine app
item.description: Even a wallpaper can carry a virus these days, so be careful what you're downloading.

item.title: The new Google Home Speaker is launching next week, and you can pre-order your new smart hub right now — but you’ll need Google Home Premium for the full Gemini package
item.description: Google has announced that its new Google Home Speaker will be go on sale on June 25.

item.title: Wear OS 7 has landed — here are the 5 biggest new features you need to know about, from live updates to widget creation
item.description: Wear OS 7 is rolling out now with three new features, but some of the biggest upgrades are still to come.

item.title: How to watch England vs Croatia: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as the Three Lions begin FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign
item.description: Here's how to watch England vs Croatia for free online and from anywhere in Group L of the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Rachat de SFR : 3 boutiques sur 4 vont disparaître
item.description: Alors que le rachat de l'opérateur au carré rouge est encore examiné par l'Autorité de la concurrence, on parle déjà de la suite. Notamment de ce qu'il va advenir des boutiques estampillées SFR.

item.title: CrankGPT is a hand-powered, fully offline AI bot powered by a Raspberry Pi and 8GB of RAM — and I'm all for apocalypse-ready chatbots that don't need data centers
item.description: If you want to protect your privacy and be kinder to the environment, you can run a local AI using a hand crank.

item.title: SanDisk's new 8TB PS5 SSD costs more than three times as much as the PS5 Pro
item.description: The highest capacity Optimus GX Pro 850P drive for the PS5 almost tops the $3,000 mark.

item.title: Only 16 percent of Americans think AI will have a positive impact on society, a new study shows
item.description: Although Wall Street loves AI, every day Americans are significantly less optimistic about the industry, a new report from Pew Research shows.

item.title: The White House Wants Anthropic to Block All Jailbreaks. That May Not Be Possible
item.description: Trump administration officials tell WIRED that if Anthropic wants to rerelease Fable 5, it will need to ensure the model's guardrails can't be circumvented. Security experts say that can't be done.

item.title: ‘A real step up in pretty much every way’: I listened to Cambridge's new Evo 300 streaming amp, and it raises the bar for modern hi-fi
item.description: First impressions of Cambridge’s new flagship just-add-speakers streaming amplifier are very good indeed.

item.title: How to watch Alone season 13 online from anywhere
item.description: Set in the bleak Richardson Mountains straddling Yukon and Canada’s Northwest Territories, here's how to watch Alone season 13 online from anywhere.

item.title: Workers are judging companies for their silence on LGBTQ+ issues
item.description: New data shows that at least 60% of workers believe support for their LGBTQ+ peers is a sign of an inclusive workplace for all employees. The sustained attacks on diversity, equity, and inclusion programs have left corporate America hesitant to speak out forcefully on LGBTQ+ issues—and that silence has not gone unnoticed.

item.title: Two Stanford grads raise $11M to build a noninvasive wearable for hormone tracking
item.description: Clair Health will track inflammation and bloating markers, energy levels, and cycle phase classification to give insights into cycle irregularities and perimenopause, as well as hormonal fluctuations, and how to navigate those changes.

item.title: The Philips Baristina is one of the best coffee makers I've ever used, and it's half price at Amazon right now — who needs Prime Day?
item.description: The Baristina makes brewing coffee with fresh beans as easy as using Nespresso pods, and you don't need to be a Prime subscriber to get this epic deal.

item.title: Carvana launches its first test drive center at a dealership, with more to come
item.description: Carvana is converting old car dealerships into test drive centers.

item.title: This Google-backed ‘phone cluster computing’ project is turning retired Pixels into low-cost Linux data centers — as UCSD researchers say a 2,000-phone cluster will soon support 100 computer science classes
item.description: Google says old phones could see their components reused as affordable cloud servers.

item.title: Jackery just released 3 new HomePower portable power stations
item.description: The new Jackery HomePower 1000 V2, HomePower 2000 Plus V2, and HomePower 3600 Pro Max are all available to purchase at Amazon.

item.title: The Echo Dot Max is cheaper than ever in an early Prime Day sale
item.description: We’re seeing good early Prime Day deals ahead of the event next week, and unsurprisingly, some of the best deals are on Amazon’s own devices. Several Echo speakers have dropped to new low prices, including the Echo Dot Max, which is on sale for $64.99 ($35 off) at Amazon. Our smart home reviewer Jennifer Pattison […]

item.title: Microsoft still has an uphill battle against Valve's SteamOS — Windows 11's Xbox mode saves on RAM usage, but apparently doesn't help with gaming performance
item.description: Xbox mode on Windows 11 does use less RAM than the standard desktop, but it seemingly means nothing for gaming performance.

item.title: The new Jackery FridgeGuard can keep your fridge cooling for up to 15 hours: Where to buy
item.description: The Jackery FridgeGuard portable power station costs $559.99 and is sold exclusively at Costco.

item.title: HDMI 2.2 is set to arrive in TVs and monitors next year, bringing uncompressed 4K at ridiculous frame rates — here's what to expect from the next-gen connector, and who it's actually most useful for
item.description: HDMI 2.2 doubles the bandwidth of HDMI 2.1 and the first products should arrive in late 2026 or into 2027

item.title: These are the 55 editor-approved early Prime Day deals I'd buy this week — save up to 65% on the AirPods 4, Echo Spot, Ninja Creami, cheap TVs, and more
item.description: While Prime Day kicks off next week, I've rounded up the 55 best early deals worth buying right now, including up to 65% off AirPods, Ninja blenders, Echo speakers, and more.

item.title: Coyote et les alertes radars : la justice européenne inflige un revers historique à cause de son propre algorithme
item.description: Saisie par le Conseil d'État, la Cour de justice de l'Union européenne (CJUE) vient d'infliger un lourd revers à Coyote. À cause de ses algorithmes, l'application perd son statut d'hébergeur passif et devra plier face aux censures temporaires de l'État.

item.title: PlayStation 5 Slim, JBL Grip et LG CineBeam S : les meilleures offres high‑tech du mercredi 17 juin 2026
item.description: Chaque journée apporte son lot de réductions intéressantes sur Amazon, Son‑Vidéo et d’autres grands marchands en ligne.

item.title: Find your lost items with the best early Prime Day Bluetooth tracker deals
item.description: As of June 17, these are the best early Prime Day Bluetooth tracker deals.

item.title: Google bets on Gemini to reinvent the smart home speaker
item.description: Google is betting generative AI can breathe new life into the smart speaker. The company's new $99.99 Google Home Speaker replaces the rigid commands of the Google Assistant era with more conversational Gemini interactions.

item.title: The best early Prime Day drone deals from DJI and Holy Stone
item.description: Save up to 29% on DJI and Holy Stone drones before Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: Vibe-decoding the White House-Anthropic fight over Fable
item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, an email for Verge subscribers about technology, politics, and what happens when science crashes headlong into self-interest. Not a subscriber? Sign up here today! Got the scoop on a petty feud that's going to somehow fundamentally reshape the entire field of frontier AI development? Send 'em over to tina.nguyen+tips@theverge.com. Back […]...

item.title: Forget NPCs, now we have CPCs — Co-Playable Characters or AI teammates in PUBG courtesy of Nvidia ACE tech, but I'm not impressed so far
item.description: Many gamers are doubtful, mystified, or think that this will be beyond amusing.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 FIFA World Cup online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: The best early Prime Day unlocked smartphone deals you can shop now — save on Samsung, Google and more
item.description: The best early Prime Day unlocked smartphone deals you can shop now – save on Samsung, Google and more
